import React, { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { Link } from "react-router-dom"; import "./teacherdashboard.css"; // Custom CSS for styles const Dashboard = () => { const [darkMode] = useState(false); const username = localStorage.getItem("username"); const token = localStorage.getItem("accessToken"); const [info, setInfo] = useState({}); const [error, setError] = useState(""); const [showPanel, setShowPanel] = useState(false); useEffect(() => { fetch("http://localhost:8000/api/teacher-info/", { headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`, }, }) .then((res) => { if (!res.ok) throw new Error("Failed to fetch teacher info"); return res.json(); }) .then((data) => setInfo(data)) .catch(() => setError("Failed to load teacher info.")); }, [token]); const togglePanel = () => setShowPanel(!showPanel); const closePanel = () => setShowPanel(false); return (
e.stopPropagation()} >

📊 Teacher Dashboard

Welcome, {username}
👤 My Info

Username: {info.username || 'N/A'}

Email: {info.email || 'N/A'}

Teacher ID: {info.teacher_id || 'N/A'}

{error &&
{error}
}
📚 Students

Manage all registered students.

👨‍🏫 Teachers

View and update teacher records.

📘 Subjects

Explore subjects offered by the school.

🏫 Classrooms

Assign students and teachers to classes.

📅 Timetable

Manage class schedules and time slots.

✅ Attendance

Track daily attendance records.

🏅 Grades

Enter and view student grades.

); }; export default Dashboard;
